materialChanges: Replaced the repeated nitrate-sensor mastery item with a novel acoustics comparison whose independent, dependent, controlled, confounding, and control roles must be constructed without a nearby answer key.
Replaced the unusable build-your-own practice instruction with two complete supplied comparisons, an independent six-role audit, relationship-level self-check criteria, and an alternate-case retry.

Converted both single-choice mastery items to open responses so their analytic rubric criteria are independently observable, added the objective's required role explanations, and removed eliminable distractors.
Made every retry context novel and performable, clarified the high-background control pattern, and separated later retrieval prompts from feedback with check directives and answer headings.

Added honest prerequisite links and an in-lesson recovery task for the unpublished hypotheses-and-predictions lesson, disclosed the finalizer provenance, and regenerated the deterministic PREM-SCI-003 reader artifact.

reviewDispositions.rationale: The final lesson preserves the academically accurate distinction between controlled variables and control conditions and continues to require both systematic pairing with the independent variable and a plausible effect on the dependent variable before naming a candidate confounder.

The four-point transfer item now uses a novel sound-dampening-panel comparison with microphone identity as the rival factor and silent-input and calibration-tone controls; no scene provides this role map or its answer.

Case C now supplies two bounded comparisons with all necessary givens, asks the learner to construct the complete audit independently, and provides relationship-level self-check and alternate-case retry guidance.
The retry now uses a previously unanswered detergent comparison and supplies held-alike conditions, a water-only control, a machine pairing, and the exact reasoning relationships to reconstruct.

Both formerly single-choice items are now open responses, so each analytic criterion is separately observable and the reader presents a manual criterion self-check after the learner submits reasoning.
The role-identification item no longer uses answer options or eliminable distractors; it requires independent construction of all three role labels and their set, record, and hold-alike explanations.

The retry now states that negative control, positive control, and unknown all read high, asks what the negative control shows about background, and names the unknown-interpretation criterion being re-tested.

The first scene names and links PREM-SCI-001 and the planned PREM-SCI-002 graph outcome, explicitly states that the second open lesson is not yet published, and supplies a usable hypothesis-to-prediction recovery task; the closing recovery route repeats that honest path.

The compact audit, resin map, seedling distinction, field-sensor transfer, and cumulative chain are now explicit check directives, with feedback or suggested answers separated under descriptive headings after the attempt.

The first mastery item now asks for a job explanation for the independent, dependent, and controlled variables, and each of its three rubric criteria requires both the correct case detail and the corresponding role relationship.

The verified plain-language zero-reading opening and complete indicator worked example were retained because they already passed the first-read gate and expose the full decision process without internal project vocabulary.

The final lesson retains the direct controlled-variable versus control-condition contrast, the two-link confounder test and boundary case, and the expected-response distinction between positive and negative controls.

The coherent six-verb audit sequence, bounded field-sensor transfer, cumulative chain, text-first completion routes, and explicit next-outcome boundary remain intact; the assessment now adds a separate novel transfer case.

evidenceChecked: Verified the four-scene semantic source order, one level-one heading per scene, descending internal headings, text equivalents for every table relationship, and check directives that place learner prompts before feedback headings.

Exercised the generated PREM-SCI-003 reader with Playwright: all four open responses accepted keyboard focus, criterion self-check feedback appeared after submission, 390 CSS-pixel reflow had no horizontal page overflow, and no runtime error occurred.

Verified print parity for all four scenes, all four assessment items with answer logic, references, glossary, and finalizer attribution; the lesson uses no color-, position-, sound-, motion-, hover-, drag-, speed-, wet-lab-, fieldwork-, or equipment-only learning path.

Confirmed that every assessment is untimed and retakeable, every supplied task is performable from text alone, alternate response forms include prose, bullets, tables, typing, dictation, and assistive technology, and no personal, patient, participant, or environmental record is requested.

Ran strict source preflight successfully for both source records and confirmed dated terms routes, checked-no-agent-restriction-found status, factual-reference use, and facts-only-original-expression rights bases.

Confirmed CC BY 4.0 contribution terms, original fictional cases and assessment expression, zero third-party assets or datasets, complete ATTRIBUTION.md source and agent disclosure, and exact finalizer run and sha256:e60d304b1451b88b6133477d8d504f14d4f0fc0b98e6af6ca01a28ae4ceb9547 instruction provenance.

Confirmed normalized pack-local files, no symlinks, raw HTML, scripts, event handlers, iframes, styles, Markdown images, data URLs, remote embeds, executable content, secrets, personal data, clinical direction, or unsafe experiment instructions.
limitations: No disabled learner or human assistive-technology user participated; keyboard focus, narrow reflow, semantic controls, runtime behavior, and print parity were exercised in automated Chromium rather than with a screen reader hardware and browser matrix.

PDF, EPUB, DOCX, and JATS exporters are not implemented in the repository, so their output could not be tested; canonical text, print output, and the generated web reader were checked for equivalent content.

The audit relied on the candidate's dated source-access and rights records plus strict repository preflight and did not re-open substantive source pages; it is an accountability and internal-consistency check, not legal advice or platform verification of source terms.

No real learner or independent human subject-matter expert tested the final revision, so no claim is made about measured comprehension, mastery rates, or human verification beyond the recorded advisory reviews.

rationale: The original candidate is PREM-SCI-003 v0.1.0 at 2e08cf491b13cc51322fb535c4ae116b05ccd124 under standard-lesson-v3. Its two eligible advisory records target that exact commit and are exact, non-dismissed GitHub COMMENTED transports from github:VSBDev: one academic approve from Google run 9b497d8d-8ed7-439f-b3dc-c8bbc77ffe87 and one learning-design request-changes from Anthropic run 95454686-0b68-4fb2-bd94-5d44a5687014. The finalizer independently recomputed two inputs, one approval, one change request, the academic and learning-design role minimums, two distinct review runs, two distinct declared providers, and one accountable principal. Final commit 35e4fdf0bbf518c98cc7b7b8cc5a932d34dae812 contains both unchanged reviews and the single bounded lesson revision. Every indexed finding is disposed above: the material practice and assessment defects were incorporated; the verified opening, distinctions, worked reasoning, and transfer structure were preserved. Strict source preflight, targeted lesson validation, full npm run verify, a security scan, and a lesson-specific keyboard, reflow, feedback, and print audit all passed. The remaining limitations and founding-stage conflict are disclosed rather than treated as proof of independence. With no unresolved blocker, accurate answer logic, novel assessed transfer, performable independent practice, a satisfied accessibility-and-rights audit, and complete attested provenance, merge is the proportionate adjudication decision.
dissent: The learning-design input requested changes to the original candidate; its two major and seven minor findings were incorporated in the one-pass final revision, while its three positive notes were preserved without change.

The same accountable principal, VSBDev, operated the authoring, review, and finalization agents. This founding-stage conflict is permitted by policy but provides no principal-level independence, and all run and provider provenance is disclosed and attested rather than platform-verified.

The academic reviewer reported that no human subject-matter expert verified the technical claims beyond the candidate's reference materials; this limitation remains visible despite the academic approve verdict.
conditions: The maintainer may perform only the documented publication transition after this commit: update lesson status and sourceConfidence, promote retained claims' reviewStatus fields, regenerate deterministic outputs, and rerun all checks; no teaching-content change is authorized after finalCommit.

Keep the pull request draft until the publication transition is committed, then mark it ready so protected GitHub provenance and agent-protocol checks can verify merge readiness; this merge decision is not permission for this finalizer to push, merge, or publish.

adjudicator.displayName: VSBDev — standard lesson finalizer and adjudicator
